title: Dortmanna heterophylla
intro:
There is no information about the plant "Dortmanna heterophylla". However, I found a plant called "Dortmanna" also known as "Dortmanna aquatica" and "Dortmanna aquatilis" that is known as "Water Avens". 

Dortmanna aquatica, also known as Water Avens, is a plant species in the family Rosaceae. It is a perennial aquatic plant that grows in wetlands and is known for its medicinal properties.

Dortmanna aquatica has been traditionally used for its health benefits, including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The plant is also known to have antioxidant and immunomodulatory effects.

The bioactive constituents of Dortmanna aquatica include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.

The most common herbal preparations made with Dortmanna aquatica include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
taxonomy: Dortmanna heterophylla is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Myricaceae. It is a member of the genus Dortmanna.
